ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WEI FENG GUAN IS PRESENT ASSITED BY CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER AMY LO.
